title: FINANCIAL CONTROLLER
description:
Role/Job Summary

Responsible for all financial functions of Enetek Power Group and its subsidiaries, including managing finance personnel across the Group. This role supports sales in project financing decisions and provides timely financial analysis and strategic advice to assist management in business planning, growth, and decision-making. The position ensures strong financial governance, compliance, and operational efficiency across all entities.

Main Responsibilities and Tasks

• Manage the full spectrum of finance and accounting activities for the Group, including inter-company transactions, accruals, and reconciliations across all entities.

• Prepare accurate and timely monthly consolidated financial statements and management reports

• Prepare and lead financial planning, budgeting, cash flow management, and forecasting to support strategic decision-making.

• Establish, maintain, and enforce robust internal control systems, policies, and procedures

• Manage the statutory compliance requirements for subsidiaries, branches, and representative offices in the region.

• Manage internal and external audits, addressing queries effectively.

• Supervise and mentor the finance team in day-to-day operations

• Provide financial analysis and advice to support sales, projects, and business strategy.

• Perform any ad-hoc duties as assigned by Management.

Qualifications / Requirements

• Minimum bachelor’s degree in accountancy or a related discipline

• At least 5 years of relevant hands-on experience, ideally in a supervisory or managerial role.

• Strong analytical and conceptual skills.

• High attention to detail and accuracy.

• Able to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

• Demonstrates integrity, dependability, and a strong sense of urgency with a results-oriented mindset.

• Solid business acumen and proven leadership abilities.

• Sound judgment, planning, and problem-solving skills.

• Excellent communication skills and a team player mentality

• Highly self-motivated and independent.

• Willingness to travel if required.

postedCompany.description:
Enetek Power Group is a Singapore-based provider of advanced AC and DC power solutions, established in 2015. With deep roots in the power conversion industry, our team brings decades of experience from leading global companies. We serve Mobile Network Operators, Tower Companies, and OEMs like Nokia with innovative and reliable energy solutions.

Operating in over 10 countries and supported by a distributor network across 50+ countries, Enetek has a strong global footprint. We are ISO9001, ISO14001, ISO45001, and ISO27001 certified, ensuring high standards across our operations.

Enetek’s major shareholder, Eltek Holding AS (Norway), plays a key strategic role in our continued growth. With offices across Asia, Europe, and the Middle East, we remain agile and committed to delivering world-class power solutions to our global partners.
postedCompany.name: ENETEK POWER GROUP PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
